A.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

B.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

C.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

D.text: is pulled inward toward the center

parsed.answer_value: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows a semi-transparent outer shell, which represents a stalled shockwave. As the red internal gas expands on one side, it exerts pressure on the outer shell, causing it to rupture and allowing the gas to escape freely.
